description: Style NoteIf you want to look fashionable and stylish at this time of the year, sepia has just what you need. This dressy, girly and summery top is a must-have in your wardrobe. Pair this with fitting jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, femine vibe.Product DetailsPink sleeveless long top with elastication at the waist, a knot at the neck and smocking towards the shoulder region and the back has a key hole detailMaterial and Care100 %cottonRinse seperatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery or printDry on reverse side under the sunIron at low temperatureSize and FitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M
